name: Pimento Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the cheeses in a food processor.
2. Mash the pimento with a fork.
3. Combine all ingredients with a fork until well mixed.
4. Return the mixture to the food processor and blend until smooth.
5. Spread on bread immediately if making sandwiches.
6. The spread can be stored in the refrigerator and softened in the microwave before spreading.
7. Makes 3 loaves worth of sandwiches.
